description: Art. 5(1)(h) — Real-time remote biometric identification (RBI) in publicly accessible spaces for the purposes of law enforcement. Subject to narrow exceptions (targeted search for victims of specific crimes, prevention of specific imminent threat, identification of suspects of listed offences) — anything outside is prohibited.

en: live face match in train station
public CCTV face match for police
routine police face match in public
live face scan in public square
